---
title: "The validation harness"
subtitle: "T6 · Phase T6.3 · `va-harness`"
---

::: {.callout-note}
**Status: stub.** Fill this in as the phase lands — see [the roadmap](../../roadmap.md) for
the phase definition, validation gate, and where this tutorial fits.
:::

## Goal

Run the whole zoo vs golden and report the per-rung pass/fail and convergence-fraction dashboard.

## Where it fits

_Drop the §2 pipeline diagram here with the relevant box highlighted._

## The idea

_The theory, the equations, the design choice behind this feature._

## The code

_The public API built in this phase, with its doc-comment caveats surfaced. Prefer runnable
code blocks over prose._

## It works

_The test or `va-harness` result that proves it — a plot vs ngspice golden where applicable.
A tutorial that cannot be re-run to reproduce its figures has rotted._

## Limitations

_Stated honestly (`CLAUDE.md` §5)._

## What's next

_Pointer to the next phase / tutorial._
